### 🗂 Content / CMS Update

**Content Type:**  
- [ ] UI Text  
- [ ] CMS Article  
- [ ] Legal Copy  

**Locales Affected:**  
- [ ] en-US  
- [ ] fr-FR  
- [ ] es-MX  

**Pre-Launch Checklist:**  
- [ ] Copy reviewed and approved  
- [ ] Localization synced (i18n)  
- [ ] Screenshots attached  
- [ ] QA passed in staging  
- [ ] Rollback/versioning plan in place  

---

### ✅ Requirements & Best Practices

**Platform Stack:**  
- **Tooling:** `bun`, `TypeScript`, `valibot`, `biome`  
- **Infrastructure:** `GCP`, `Kubernetes`, `Docker`, `Argo`, `Cloudflare`  
- **Monitoring:** `Sentry`, `Umami`, observability stack  
- **Frontend:** `Svelte`, iOS, Android, App Stores  
- **Payments:** `Stripe`

**Content Standards:**  
- Use clear, concise, inclusive language  
- Avoid technical jargon unless contextually necessary  
- Ensure all text is fully localizable and locale-aware  
- Match brand voice and tone consistently  
- Verify UI string length fits design constraints  
- Ensure full accessibility compliance (e.g., alt text, ARIA labels)  
- Use secure, HTTPS-only external links  
- Follow key naming conventions (`camelCase` / `snake_case`)  
- Validate responsive layout across devices and screen sizes  
- Preview and verify in staging before deployment

---

**Note:** All changes must be synced with the localization platform and verified in context before go-live.
